2603.26253.title: SocialX: A Modular Platform for Multi-Source Big Data Research in Indonesia
2603.26253.paper_summary: Big data research in Indonesia is constrained by a fundamental fragmentation: relevant data is scattered across social media, news portals, e-commerce platforms, review sites, and academic databases, each with different formats, access methods, and noise characteristics. Researchers must independently build collection pipelines, clean heterogeneous data, and assemble separate analysis tools, a process that often overshadows the research itself. We present SocialX, a modular platform for multi-source big data research that integrates heterogeneous data collection, language-aware preprocessing, and pluggable analysis into a unified, source-agnostic pipeline. The platform separates concerns into three independent layers (collection, preprocessing, and analysis) connected by a lightweight job-coordination mechanism. This modularity allows each layer to grow independently: new data sources, preprocessing methods, or analysis tools can be added without modifying the existing pipeline. We describe the design principles that enable this extensibility, detail the preprocessing methodology that addresses challenges specific to Indonesian text across registers, and demonstrate the platform's utility through a walkthrough of a typical research workflow. SocialX is publicly accessible as a web-based platform at https://www.socialx.id.
2603.26253.paper_summary_zh: 印尼的大數據研究受到根本性碎片化的限制：相關數據散佈在社交媒體、新聞門戶、電子商務平台、評論網站和學術數據庫中，每個平台都有不同的格式、訪問方式和噪音特徵。研究人員必須獨立構建數據收集管道，清理異構數據，並組裝單獨的分析工具，這一過程往往掩蓋了研究本身。我們提出了SocialX，這是一個模組化的多源大數據研究平台，將異構數據收集、語言感知預處理和可插拔分析整合成一個統一的、與來源無關的管道。該平台將關注點分為三個獨立的層次（收集、預處理和分析），通過輕量級的任務協調機制連接。這種模組化使每個層次可以獨立增長：新的數據來源、預處理方法或分析工具可以在不修改現有管道的情況下添加。我們描述了使這種擴展性成為可能的設計原則，詳細介紹了針對印尼文本在不同註冊中所面臨挑戰的預處理方法，並通過典型研究工作流程的演示展示了該平台的實用性。SocialX作為一個基於網頁的平台，公眾可訪問，網址為 https://www.socialx.id。
2603.26253.author: Muhammad Apriandito Arya Saputra et.al.
2603.26253.authors: Muhammad Apriandito Arya Saputra, Andry Alamsyah, Dian Puteri Ramadhani, Thomhert Suprapto Siadari, Hanif Fakhrurroja
